creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #35)
I managed to get it working with this simple change:

sed -i '' 's/RHOME/R_HOME/' /usr/local/lib/rstudio/bin/r-ldpath

Without this change the script sets LD_LIBRARY_PATH to "/usr/lib:....." so any subprocess started by rstudio (e.g. rsession) loads the wrong libgcc_s.
